name: frontend-code-review
tagline: Reviews Dify frontend code (React/Next/TS) for correctness, accessibility, dify-ui usage, data boundaries, performance, and tests.
verdict: Well-scoped, concrete review process with clear severities, output template, and good context economy via split reference files. Gaps: no fallback if the remote guidelines fetch or required local docs fail, and no versioning signal.

highlights.summary: Fetching web-interface-guidelines and reading several required local docs has no stated fallback if fetch/read fails.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
